talents.name: Sure Shot
talents.description: Your ranged attacks ignore some of a target's Armour Points.

talents.name: Sharp
talents.description: You are quick to notice things; bonus to relevant Perception tests.

talents.name: Hardy
talents.description: You gain extra Wounds equal to your Toughness Bonus per rank taken.

talents.name: Lightning Reflexes
talents.description: Reroll one failed Initiative test per combat.

talents.name: Menacing
talents.description: You are imposing; +10 to Intimidate tests.

talents.name: Petty Magic
talents.description: You can cast the Petty Magic spells.

talents.name: Arcane Magic (Fire)
talents.description: You can cast spells from the Lore of Fire.

talents.name: Read/Write
talents.description: You can read and write the languages you speak.

talents.name: Bless (Shallya)
talents.description: You can perform the Blessings of Shallya.

talents.name: Invoke (Shallya)
talents.description: You can invoke the Miracles of Shallya.

talents.name: Kind-hearted
talents.description: +10 to Charm tests with those in distress.
